title: Portable AI Swarm Simulation Workbench
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: Executable packet Buildprint for a source-independent AI swarm simulation workbench: upload seed material, generate ontology, build graph context, prepare and run simulations, generate reports, chat with agents, and manage history through proof-gated phase files.
plainDescription: A Mapper OS executable packet remapped from MiroFish source evidence and scoped as the full portable AI swarm simulation workbench. It now requires production-grade architecture by default while keeping qualification honest until live provider, runtime, browser/e2e, persistence, security, and deployment proof passes.
promise: Build a production-grade portable AI swarm simulation workbench without depending on the original source repo. Status remains PROOF_REQUIRED until all proof gates pass.
whatYouGet: Executable Buildprint BUILDPRINT start and machine contract
Six production-grade phase files with source evidence, implementation paths, team gates, and proof gates
Production readiness contract for auth/session/tenant, providers, durable persistence, workers, deployment/ops, observability, CI, and browser/e2e
Phase-flow orchestration and evidence ledger seed with unresolved blocker rules
whatYouNeed: LLM provider credentials for live ontology/report/profile proof, or acceptance that only live proof remains blocked
Zep-compatible graph-memory credentials for live graph proof, or a configured adapter/test-double path
OASIS/CAMEL-compatible runtime or approved simulation worker, plus deployment authorization for production proof
Persistence/backend and browser test environment capable of repeatable e2e proof
includes: 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl seed ledger with runtime writes to .buildprint/evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl
risks: Counting deterministic adapters as live provider proof
Treating missing credentials as permission to omit provider adapters/config/tests
Static graph/report data presented as real behavior
Secret leakage through logs, reports, screenshots, or ledger entries
checks: Production readiness contract required before phase work
Provider adapters/config/tests required before live-proof blockers
Repeatable browser/e2e proof required for UI phases
Qualification remains PROOF_REQUIRED until proof gates pass

trustBadges.label: Production-grade default
trustBadges.detail: Auth, providers, runtime, persistence, ops, and e2e gates are required by default.

copyPrompt: Use the Portable AI Swarm Simulation Workbench Buildprint. First bootstrap exact snapshots: agb start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/portable-ai-swarm-simulation-workbench/package.json . If agb is not installed, clone https://github.com/DomEscobar/agent-buildprint and run node agent-buildprint/bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/portable-ai-swarm-simulation-workbench/package.json . Then read .buildprint/next-agent.md and continue. Do not write Buildprint snapshots manually. The bootstrapped guide will route through BUILDPRINT.md, 01-questions.md, 02-project-setup.md, blueprint.yaml, 03-phases/phase-index.yaml, 03-phases/phase-flow.md, the active phase file, 04-evaluation.md, and 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl. Complete project setup before phase implementation. Production-grade architecture is the default: implement auth/session/tenant boundaries, provider adapters/config/tests, durable persistence, worker/runtime ownership, deployment/ops shape, observability, security controls, and repeatable browser/e2e proof before accepting live-proof blockers. Missing credentials, paid services, or deployment authorization block live proof only after adapter/config/test/runtime wiring exists. Create project root/local AGENTS.md only in the implementation project from 02-project-setup.md, never inside the blueprint packet. Execute one active phase at a time through phase-flow with observe, plan, execute, verify, reflect, and record. Runtime evidence belongs in .buildprint/evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl; packaged 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl is seed-only. Keep claims proof-required until proof rows pass. Build the portable AI swarm simulation workbench from the Buildprint package, not from the original source checkout.

publicStatus.label: Mapped, proof pending
publicStatus.explanation: Source-independent packet exists; live implementation proof is not complete.
